description.en: Optional opaque data associated to this file object: for example, this could be used to store a per-client session ID.

description.en: The default selector class, using the most efficient implementation available on the current platform. This should be the default choice for most users.

description.en: select.devpoll()-based selector. fileno()¶ This returns the file descriptor used by the underlying select.devpoll() object. Added in version 3.5.

excerpt.es: select.devpoll()-based selector. fileno()¶ This returns the file descriptor used by the underlying select.devpoll() object. Added in version 3.5.
